solutions.title: Tutorial
solutions.content:
1170A - Three Integers Again
We always can consider that the numbers in the input are $$$x = a + b$$$ and $$$y = b + c$$$. If $$$x  \gt  y$$$ let's swap them. Note, that $$$a + b + c = a + b + (y - b) = a + y$$$. That's why it's optimal to minimize value of $$$a$$$. So the value of $$$a$$$ can always be $$$1$$$. Then we can restore $$$b = x - a$$$, and $$$c = y - b$$$.

solutions.title: Solution
solutions.content:
fun main
()
{
val q
=
readLine
()!!.
toInt
()
repeat
(
q
)
{
val
(
x
,
y
)
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}.
sorted
()
println
(
"1 $$${x - 1} $$${y - x + 1}"
)
}
}
